mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO MSSAPP.MC_CEVENT_OPTN (CEVENT_OPTN_ID, CEVENT_ID, OPTN_NUM, CEVENT_PAID_STAT_CDE, EXPT_PAY_DATE, ACT_PAID_DATE, EX_SUB_PAID_STAT_CDE, EX_SUB_EXPT_PAY_DATE, EX_SUB_ACT_PAID_DATE, IS_DISABLED, REC_VER_NUM, INIT_TIME, LAST_UPD_TIME, LAST_UPD_BY, TAG_SEQ) VALUES (#{item.ceventOptnId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.ceventId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.optnNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.ceventPaidStatCde,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.exptPayDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.actPaidDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.exSubPaidStatCde,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.exSubExptPayDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.exSubActPaidDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.isDisabled,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.recVerNum,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.initTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.lastUpdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.lastUpdBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tagSeq,jdbcType=BIGINT})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
